# Fix 21.0.4 — correctifs vs 21.0.3

> Correctifs livrés par le patch `21.0.4` (publié le 2026-02-11). La documentation de cette skill (`references/`) reflète le **dernier** patch de la mineure : si votre projet est sur un patch **antérieur** à `21.0.4`, les correctifs ci-dessous ne sont **pas** dans votre version.
> Storybook exact de ce patch : https://lucca-front.lucca.io/v21.0.4/storybook

## API (diff structurel)

### button

+ selector `span[luButton]`

### popover2

`PopoverDirective` :
  ~ `luPopoverPosition` : PopoverPosition → 'above' | 'below' | 'before' | 'after'


## Stories (sources)

Diff complet des sources de stories (`stories/`) entre `v21.0.3` et `v21.0.4`. Les suppressions embarquent le contenu supprimé.

````diff

diff --git a/stories/documentation/overlays/tooltip/tooltip-ellipsis.stories.ts b/stories/documentation/overlays/tooltip/tooltip-ellipsis.stories.ts
index 2b40b090c..7615b30eb 100644
--- a/stories/documentation/overlays/tooltip/tooltip-ellipsis.stories.ts
+++ b/stories/documentation/overlays/tooltip/tooltip-ellipsis.stories.ts
@@ -2,11 +2,16 @@ import { Component } from '@angular/core';
 import { provideAnimations } from '@angular/platform-browser/animations';
 import { LuTooltipModule } from '@lucca-front/ng/tooltip';
 import { applicationConfig, Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/angular';
+import { interval, map } from 'rxjs';
+import { AsyncPipe } from '@angular/common';
 
 @Component({
 	selector: 'tooltip-stories',
-	imports: [LuTooltipModule],
-	template: ` <h1>With ellipsis (should be green)</h1>
+	imports: [LuTooltipModule, AsyncPipe],
+	template: ` <h1>With ellipsis after few seconds</h1>
+		<div class="test ellipsis width400 fontSize2" luTooltip luTooltipWhenEllipsis>{{ dynamicContent$ | async }}</div>
+
+		<h1>With ellipsis (should be green)</h1>
 		<div class="test ellipsis width400 fontSize2" luTooltip luTooltipWhenEllipsis>Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur adipisicing elit.</div>
 		<div class="test ellipsis width400 paddingRight" luTooltip luTooltipWhenEllipsis>Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur adipisicing elit.</div>
 		<div class="test ellipsis width400 paddingLeft" luTooltip luTooltipWhenEllipsis>Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur adipisicing elit.</div>
@@ -94,7 +99,13 @@ import { applicationConfig, Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/angular';
 		`,
 	],
 })
-class TooltipStory {}
+class TooltipStory {
+	dynamicContent$ = interval(1000).pipe(
+		map((i) => {
+			return 'lorem '.repeat(i);
+		}),
+	);
+}
 
 export default {
 	title: 'Documentation/Overlays/Tooltip/Ellipsis tests',

+			template: cleanupTemplate(`<lu-box ${generateInputs(args, argTypes)}>Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet</lu-box>`),
 		};
 	},
 } as Meta;
 
-export const Basic: StoryObj<BoxComponent & { content: string }> = {

 		neutral: false,
 		killable: false,
-		withArrow: false,

 };
````
